calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Richard Munzinger, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creative Financial Staffing, Inc.,
Plaintiff's Witness: Daniel Joseph Casey, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Eicon Inc., as follows:
Damages $29,835.00
Prejudgment Interest $5,718.00
Costs $901.00, for a total of $36,454.00
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Larisa Meisenheimer for plaintiff and moving party

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. The application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is: GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
